Heading One

Some intro paragraph with bold, italic, and inline code. A link to
GoFastr and an image: .

Heading Two

A second paragraph that uses a <script> tag — should be escaped — and an
ampersand: A & B.

Lists

Unordered:

  • alpha
  • beta
  • gamma

Ordered:

  1. first
  2. second
  3. third

Code

package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("<hi>")
}

Quote

A quote with bold inside.
A second line in the same quote.

Table

NameScore
A10
B20

End paragraph with an escaped *literal asterisk* and a backslash \.
